message:
refactor(wasm): extract column_meta and aggregates modules

Reduce wasm.zig from 705 to 514 lines by extracting:
- column_meta.zig: Protobuf parsing for column metadata
- aggregates.zig: Column aggregation functions (sum/min/max/avg)

Also fix subquery test failures by providing execute_fn callback
in Executor.evaluateWhere for EXISTS and IN subquery support.
